Economy & Taxation.position_summary: APC supports market-oriented economic reforms aimed at fiscal sustainability and growth, including removal of fuel subsidies and exchange rate unification, alongside infrastructure investment and economic diversification away from oil.
key_policies: Removal of the fuel subsidy to reduce state expenditure
Unification of the exchange rate to attract foreign investment
Investment in infrastructure including railways and power generation
Diversification of Nigeria's economy beyond oil through foreign investment and international trade
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: removing the costly fuel subsidy that was bankrupting the state and unifying the exchange rate to attract foreign investment

Healthcare.position_summary: APC supports expanding access to primary healthcare by establishing centres across all local government areas in Nigeria.
key_policies: Expansion of primary healthcare centres across all local government areas
Healthcare.supporting_quote: we are expanding primary healthcare centres across all local government areas

Climate & Environment.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: APC supports education reform with a focus on technical and vocational training as a means to address youth unemployment.
key_policies: Education reform
Expanding technical and vocational training
Reducing youth unemployment through skills-based education
Education.supporting_quote: expanding technical and vocational training to reduce youth unemployment

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: APC supports attracting foreign investment and expanding international trade as tools to diversify Nigeria's economy, though no specific EU or bilateral foreign policy positions are outlined.
key_policies: Support for foreign investment to grow the Nigerian economy
Promotion of international trade to reduce oil dependency
Exchange rate unification to create a more attractive environment for foreign investors
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We support foreign investment and international trade to diversify Nigeria's economy beyond oil dependency.

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The PDP opposes the current administration's economic reforms, which they argue have caused high inflation and a cost of living crisis, and pledges to restore economic stability while reducing oil dependency.
key_policies: Reverse economic reforms deemed harmful to ordinary Nigerians
Diversify the economy away from oil dependency through agriculture, manufacturing, and technology
Restore economic stability and address the cost of living crisis
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: We will reverse policies that have harmed ordinary Nigerians and restore economic stability.

Healthcare.position_summary: The PDP supports expanding healthcare access to all Nigerians and strengthening public health infrastructure through increased investment.
key_policies: Universal healthcare coverage
Investment in public hospitals
Healthcare.supporting_quote: We support universal healthcare coverage and investment in public hospitals.

Climate & Environment.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: The PDP supports increased government funding for public educational institutions and aims to eliminate recurring academic strikes that disrupt students' learning.
key_policies: Increase funding for public schools
Increase funding for universities
End the cycle of strikes that disrupts student education
Education.supporting_quote: we will increase funding for public schools and universities and end the cycle of strikes that disrupts student education

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The Labour Party emphasizes anti-corruption efforts and redirecting recovered funds toward public services, while advocating for a living wage and stronger worker protections as pillars of economic reform.
key_policies: Aggressive anti-corruption measures with recovered funds redirected to education, healthcare, and infrastructure
A living wage for all Nigerian workers
Stronger protections for workers' rights
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: we will fight corruption aggressively and redirect recovered funds into education healthcare and infrastructure

Healthcare.position_summary: The Labour Party does not outline specific healthcare policies, but indicates that funds recovered from fighting corruption would be redirected into healthcare among other priority areas.
key_policies: Redirect anti-corruption recovered funds into healthcare
Healthcare.supporting_quote: fight corruption aggressively and redirect recovered funds into education healthcare and infrastructure

Climate & Environment.position_summary: The Labour Party supports stronger environmental protection, with a particular focus on communities in the Niger Delta that have been harmed by oil pollution.
key_policies: Stronger environmental protection legislation
Addressing oil pollution in Niger Delta communities
Prioritizing environmental justice for affected communities
Climate & Environment.supporting_quote: We support stronger environmental protection especially in the Niger Delta communities devastated by oil pollution.

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: The Labour Party supports universal access to quality public education in Nigeria, funded and provided by the state. They also propose redirecting funds recovered from anti-corruption efforts into education.
key_policies: Universal quality public education for every Nigerian child
State funding of public education
Redirecting recovered corruption funds into education
Education.supporting_quote: every Nigerian child deserves quality public education funded by the state

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Economy & Taxation.position_summary: The ADC prioritizes addressing inflation and reducing the cost of living through targeted investment in key economic sectors. They also support restructuring Nigeria's fiscal system to achieve greater fairness and efficiency through fiscal federalism.
key_policies: Tackle inflation and reduce the cost of living
Create jobs through investment in agriculture, manufacturing, and the digital economy
Restructure Nigeria's federal system with greater fiscal federalism
Economy & Taxation.supporting_quote: On the economy we will tackle inflation reduce the cost of living and create jobs through investment in agriculture manufacturing and the digital economy.

Healthcare.position_summary: The ADC supports expanded access to healthcare for Nigerians, though the platform text provides limited specific detail on healthcare policy.
key_policies: Expanded access to healthcare services

Climate & Environment.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Immigration.position_summary: No position found in platform text

Education.position_summary: The ADC supports providing free, quality education to all Nigerian children as a core commitment of their platform.
key_policies: Free education for all Nigerian children
Quality standards in education
Education.supporting_quote: We support free quality education for all Nigerian children

EU & Foreign Policy.position_summary: The ADC prioritises an Africa-centred foreign policy, emphasising continental unity and cooperation through established regional institutions rather than outlining specific positions on EU relations.
key_policies: Prioritising African unity and cooperation in foreign policy
Engagement through the African Union (AU)
Engagement through the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS)
EU & Foreign Policy.supporting_quote: We believe in a foreign policy that prioritises African unity and cooperation through the African Union and ECOWAS.
